title: Origin:Hastighet
description: Adds the Hastighet Origin made for Speed
body:
Adds the Hastighet origin made for speed. This origin is slightly inspired by the Flash.

### Positives
- Gives you the Speed ability, which lets you move fast and run on water and lava at the cost of energy. It also lets you run up 1 high blocks if you're using the Forge mod loader

- Gives you the Phaze ability, which lets you walk through blocks and also costs energy

### Neutrals
- [Energy bar]: This bar regenerates over time when not using your abilities.

### Downsides
- Gives you 50% more exhaustion. [drains your food bar 50% faster)

- Removes 3 of your hearts.
